name: agentic-command
description: Electron wrapper for terminal-based agentic AI tools

scripts.check: npm run prepare:renderer-assets && npm run check:renderer-assets && node --check scripts/sync-renderer-assets.mjs && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check src/renderer/terminalRuntime.js && node --check src/renderer/workspaceTools.js
